headline: Lam Research Faces China Curbs While IBM Pact Reshapes Growth Outlook
summary: US regulators tighten export controls on Lam Research, restricting shipments of chipmaking tools to China's Hua Hong. Lam Research is required to halt certain sales to Hua Hong, China's second-largest chipmaker, introducing new regulatory and revenue risks. Separately, Lam Research and IBM enter a five-year agreement to co-develop advanced semiconductor manufacturing technologies, including High-NA EUV. Lam Research (NasdaqGS: LRCX) sits at the center of two very different forces right now:...
